title: Runaway Girls
writer: Mort Blumenstock, Lillie Hayward, Dorothy Howell
actors: Shirley Mason, Arthur Rankin, Hedda Hopper
plot: When her drunken, irresponsible parents decide to separate, Sue Hartley disgustedly leaves home and gets a job as a manicurist; she is fired the first day, but Varden, a man-about-town, gets her a position as a modiste's model. On...
